title: Australian Lentil Skewers
description: A flavorful and nutritious vegetarian skewer recipe featuring Australian lentils, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for 30 minutes before use

instructions: Rinse the Australian lentils and soak the skewers in water for 30 minutes.
In a large bowl, mix together the lentils, intense olive oil, nutty brown sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Thread the lentil mixture onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking tray lined with parchment paper.
Brush the skewers with intense olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender and lightly browned.
